mapper.sql: id, trace_id, request_id, biz_type, biz_id, scene_code, tenant_id, user_id, agent_id, provider, model, endpoint, stream, has_text, has_image, has_document, has_video, has_tool, tool_names, max_tokens, temperature, top_p, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, reasoning_tokens, latency_ms, first_token_ms, retry_count, http_status, call_status, error_code, error_msg, cost_usd, deleted, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS calls, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS tokens, COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS costUsd, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN call_status = 1 THEN latency_ms END), 0) AS avgLatencyMs, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN call_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successCalls FROM ai_model_call_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{start} AND create_time < #{end}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS calls, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM ai_model_call_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{start} AND create_time < #{end} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT model AS model, COUNT(*) AS calls, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM ai_model_call_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{start} AND create_time < #{end} AND model IS NOT NULL AND model <> '' GROUP BY model ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT agent_id AS agentId, COUNT(*) AS calls, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS tokens, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS costUsd FROM ai_model_call_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{start} AND create_time < #{end} AND agent_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY agent_id ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS calls, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS tokens, COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) AS cacheReadTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cache_write_tokens), 0) AS cacheWriteTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS costUsd, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN call_status = 1 THEN latency_ms END), 0) AS avgLatencyMs, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN call_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successCalls, COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id) AS tenantCount FROM ai_model_call_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{start} AND create_time < #{end}

SELECT tenant_id AS tenantId, COUNT(*) AS calls, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS tokens, COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) AS cacheReadTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cache_write_tokens), 0) AS cacheWriteTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS costUsd, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN call_status = 1 THEN latency_ms END), 0) AS avgLatencyMs, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN call_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successCalls FROM ai_model_call_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{start} AND create_time < #{end} GROUP BY tenant_id ORDER BY calls DESC
